description: PGA.com is the web presence of the PGA of America, providing golf news, event information, and golf participation services such as finding coaches and places to play. It also exposes machine-accessible endpoints related to playing golf and site data.
summary: PGA exposes a public MCP server at `https://mcp.pga.com/mcp` and also has a GraphQL endpoint at `https://api.pga.com/graphql` with undocumented authentication status.
